_comment: spec.maxLines raised from the 120-line default to accommodate spec 5.1's dogfooding records: the fill sheets under specs/5.1/fills/ plus catalog.md and the ever-growing findings.md shakeout log carry verbatim prompt/fixture/rubric data and an append-only log that are legitimately long. Genuine specs stay well under this, so the flow-spec-guard soft bloat nudge still fires for a truly bloated spec.
